resetRequest.title: Reset Password
resetRequest.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetRequest.sentTo: We've sent a password reset link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
resetRequest.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

resetConfirm.title: Set New Password
resetConfirm.subtitle: Please enter your new password below.
resetConfirm.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now login with your new password.

validation.required: Please fill in all required fields
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long

registrationSuccess.title: Registration Successful! 🎉
registrationSuccess.subtitle: Welcome to ExamCraft AI! We've sent a verification email to:
registrationSuccess.checkInbox: Please check your inbox and click the verification link to activate your account. The link will expire in 24 hours.
registrationSuccess.limitedAccess: You can still access the dashboard, but some features may be limited until you verify your email.

verifyEmail.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verifyEmail.welcomeUser: Welcome, {{name}}! Your email has been successfully verified.
verifyEmail.fullAccess: You can now access all features of ExamCraft AI.
verifyEmail.linkExpired: The verification link may have expired or is invalid.
verifyEmail.noToken: Invalid verification link. No token provided.

paymentSuccess.title: Payment Successful!
paymentSuccess.subtitle: Thank you for your subscription. Your account has been upgraded.

paymentCancel.title: Payment Canceled
paymentCancel.subtitle: The payment process was canceled. No charges were made.

documentLibrary.title: Document Library ({{count}} documents)
documentLibrary.noDocumentsHint: Upload documents to start creating RAG-based exams.
documentLibrary.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to delete the document "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
documentLibrary.needsProcessing: Document must be processed first to display content.

documentUpload.dropHint: Drag files here or click to select
documentUpload.uploadSummary: {{completed}} of {{total}} files successfully uploaded and processed
documentUpload.processingInfo: Documents are being processed and prepared for RAG exams. This may take a few minutes depending on file size.

questionCard.noComments: No comments yet. Click the comment icon to add one.

questionEditor.explanationHint: Optional: Provide an explanation for the answer
questionEditor.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to cancel?
questionEditor.validationQuestionLength: Question text must be at least 10 characters long
questionEditor.validationMinOptions: Multiple choice questions need at least 2 options
questionEditor.validationAnswerInOptions: The correct answer must be one of the options

errorBoundary.title: An error occurred
errorBoundary.message: Sorry, an unexpected error has occurred. We have been automatically notified and will fix the problem.
errorBoundary.support: If the problem persists, please contact support.

ragExamCreator.premiumDescription: The RAG Exam Creator feature is available in the Premium package. This feature allows you to automatically generate exam questions from your documents using AI-powered RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).
ragExamCreator.premiumUpgrade: To access this feature, please upgrade to the Starter, Professional, or Enterprise plan.
